title: pelargonium × integrifolium
intro: Pelargonium × integrifolium, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium family, characterized by its fragrant, pink or white flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to create a variety of products, such as skincare creams, perfumes, and aromatherapy blends.
